calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF EXAMINATION CALENDAR
Off Calendar Jul-03-2023 Off Calendar

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Apr-06-2023 Set For Trial On Apr-06-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 504

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-06-2023 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
MURAT BAJRAMI Plaintiff/Respondent in pro per.
CAMERON G. SCOTT Defendant/Appellant in pro per.

All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Mr. Bajrami Plaintiff/Respondent testifies on his own behalf.
Mr. Bajrami presents the following exhibits to the Court:

-Invoice
-Police report

Mr. Scott Defendant/Appellant testifies on his own behalf.
Mr. Scott presents the following exhibits to the Court:

-Video of a passcode not working.

The Court does not view the video.

The Court allows the parties to make any concluding remarks.
Matter is submitted.

At the conclusion of the trial, the Court rules in open Court as follows:
The Court rules that the Judgement is filed 1/30/20203 by Judge Randle is AFFIRMED.

All exhibits are returned to the Parties.

Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Clerk: K. Septien, Not reported, (504).

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-05-2023 Continued To Apr-06-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jan-30-2023 Judgment Entered
